svg.title: FoodCart Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture showing code flow from developer through Azure DevOps to AKS cluster

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tools does the developer use in this project?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the Azure Repos foodcart repository?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the Build stage of the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the Deploy stage of the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is Azure Container Registry used for in this project?')

svg.text: AKS Cluster — foodcart-aks | 1 node Standard_B2s | Kubernetes v1.34.8

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is MongoDB deployed in Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('How is the Flask backend deployed in Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('How is the React frontend deployed in Kubernetes?')
sendPrompt('How do users access the FoodCart app?')
